chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1566 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.12.2025 Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that he will approach before proper forum. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
